description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that triggers on workflow dispatch, push to master, and pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: MSVC x64 Build and MinGW x64 Build. The MSVC job checks out the code, creates a build environment, configures the build with CMake, and builds with MSVC. The MinGW job checks out the code, sets up MSYS2, configures the build with CMake, and builds with MinGW, with a matrix strategy for MINGW64 and UCRT64 environments.
